context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements Java scalar and table UDFs following Flink conventions, builds with the correct Maven shade plugin setup, handles null inputs, and follows the Confluent Cloud UDF deployment workflow.

checklist.name: Public eval method
checklist.description: MaskEmail has a public eval(String) method that returns String

checklist.name: Null handling in scalar
checklist.description: MaskEmail.eval() checks for null input and returns null (not throwing exception)

checklist.name: FunctionHint annotation
checklist.description: ExtractPiiFields uses @FunctionHint with @DataTypeHint specifying the output ROW type

checklist.name: Collect method usage
checklist.description: ExtractPiiFields uses collect(Row.of(...)) to emit rows

checklist.name: Maven shade plugin
checklist.description: pom.xml includes maven-shade-plugin for building a fat JAR

checklist.name: Python udf decorator
checklist.description: Python UDF uses @udf decorator with result_type parameter from pyflink.table.udf

checklist.name: Artifact upload command
checklist.description: Deploy script uses 'confluent flink artifact create' with --cloud, --region, and --artifact-file flags

checklist.name: CREATE FUNCTION with artifact
checklist.description: Deploy script includes CREATE FUNCTION ... AS 'class.name' USING JAR 'confluent-artifact://cfa-xxxxx' syntax

checklist.name: LATERAL TABLE usage
checklist.description: Example SQL for the table function uses LATERAL TABLE(...) or joinLateral syntax
